verses.latin_vulgate: Et dixit Samuel ad Saul : Me misit Dominus ut ungerem te in regem super populum ejus Israël : nunc ergo audi vocem Domini.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיֹּ֤אמֶר שְׁמוּאֵל֙ אֶל־שָׁא֔וּל אֹתִ֨י שָׁלַ֤ח יְהֹוָה֙ לִמְשׇׁחֳךָ֣ לְמֶ֔לֶךְ עַל־עַמּ֖וֹ עַל־יִשְׂרָאֵ֑ל וְעַתָּ֣ה שְׁמַ֔ע לְק֖וֹל דִּבְרֵ֥י יְהֹוָֽה׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: And Samuel said to Saul: The Lord sent me to anoint thee king over his people Israel: now therefore hearken thou unto the voice of the Lord:
verses.finnish_biblia: Mutta Samuel sanoi Saulille: Herra lähetti minun voitelemaan sinua kansansa Israelin kuninkaaksi: niin kuule siis nyt Herran sanain ääntä.
verses.king_james: Samuel also said unto Saul, The Lord sent me to anoint thee to be king over his people, over Israel: now therefore hearken thou unto the voice of the words of the Lord.

verses.latin_vulgate: Hæc dicit Dominus exercituum : Recensui quæcumque fecit Amalec Israëli : quomodo restitit ei in via cum ascenderet de Ægypto.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כֹּ֤ה אָמַר֙ יְהֹוָ֣ה צְבָא֔וֹת פָּקַ֕דְתִּי אֵ֛ת אֲשֶׁר־עָשָׂ֥ה עֲמָלֵ֖ק לְיִשְׂרָאֵ֑ל אֲשֶׁר־שָׂ֥ם לוֹ֙ בַּדֶּ֔רֶךְ בַּעֲלֹת֖וֹ מִמִּצְרָֽיִם׃
verses.douay_rheims: Thus saith the Lord of hosts: I have reckoned up all that Amalec hath done to Israel: how he opposed them in the way when they came up out of Egypt.
verses.finnish_biblia: Näin sanoo Herra Zebaot: Minä olen ajatellut etsiskellä mitä Amalek teki Israelille, kuin hän pani hänensä tiellä häntä vastaan, Egyptistä tullessa.
verses.king_james: Thus saith the Lord of hosts, I remember that which Amalek did to Israel, how he laid wait for him in the way, when he came up from Egypt.

verses.latin_vulgate: Nunc ergo vade, et percute Amalec, et demolire universa ejus : non parcas ei, et non concupiscas ex rebus ipsius aliquid, sed interfice a viro usque ad mulierem, et parvulum atque lactentem, bovem et ovem, camelum et asinum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: עַתָּה֩ לֵ֨ךְ וְהִכִּיתָ֜ה אֶת־עֲמָלֵ֗ק וְהַֽחֲרַמְתֶּם֙ אֶת־כׇּל־אֲשֶׁר־ל֔וֹ וְלֹ֥א תַחְמֹ֖ל עָלָ֑יו וְהֵמַתָּ֞ה מֵאִ֣ישׁ עַד־אִשָּׁ֗ה מֵֽעֹלֵל֙ וְעַד־יוֹנֵ֔ק מִשּׁ֣וֹר וְעַד־שֶׂ֔ה מִגָּמָ֖ל וְעַד־חֲמֽוֹר׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: Now therefore go, and smite Amalec, and utterly destroy all that he hath: spare him not, nor covet anything that is his: but slay both man and woman, child and suckling, ox and sheep, camel and ass.
verses.finnish_biblia: Mene siis nyt ja lyö Amalek, ja hukuta kaikki, mitä hänellä on, ja älä säästä häntä, mutta tapa sekä vaimo että mies, lapset ja imeväiset, karja ja lampaat, kamelit ja aasit.
verses.king_james: Now go and smite Amalek, and utterly destroy all that they have, and spare them not; but slay both man and woman, infant and suckling, ox and sheep, camel and ass.

verses.latin_vulgate: Præcepit itaque Saul populo, et recensuit eos quasi agnos : ducenta millia peditum, et decem millia virorum Juda.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיְשַׁמַּ֤ע שָׁאוּל֙ אֶת־הָעָ֔ם וַֽיִּפְקְדֵם֙ בַּטְּלָאִ֔ים מָאתַ֥יִם אֶ֖לֶף רַגְלִ֑י וַעֲשֶׂ֥רֶת אֲלָפִ֖ים אֶת־אִ֥ישׁ יְהוּדָֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: So Saul commanded the people, and numbered them as lambs: two hundred thousand footmen, and ten thousand of the men of Juda.
verses.finnish_biblia: Saul ilmoitti tämän kansalle, ja luki heitä Telaimissa; kaksisataa tuhatta jalkaväkeä, ja kymmenentuhatta miestä Juudasta.
verses.king_james: And Saul gathered the people together, and numbered them in Telaim, two hundred thousand footmen, and ten thousand men of Judah.

verses.latin_vulgate: Cumque venisset Saul usque ad civitatem Amalec, tetendit insidias in torrente.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיָּבֹ֥א שָׁא֖וּל עַד־עִ֣יר עֲמָלֵ֑ק וַיָּ֖רֶב בַּנָּֽחַל׃
verses.douay_rheims: And when Saul was come to the city of Amalec, he laid ambushes in the torrent.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja kuin Saul tuli liki Amalekilaisten kaupunkia, pani hän väijytyksen ojan tykö,
verses.king_james: And Saul came to a city of Amalek, and laid wait in the valley.

verses.latin_vulgate: Dixitque Saul Cinæo : Abite, recedite, atque descendite ab Amalec, ne forte involvam te cum eo : tu enim fecisti misericordiam cum omnibus filiis Israël, cum ascenderent de Ægypto. Et recessit Cinæus de medio Amalec.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיֹּ֣אמֶר שָׁא֣וּל אֶֽל־הַקֵּינִ֡י לְכוּ֩ סֻּ֨רוּ רְד֜וּ מִתּ֣וֹךְ עֲמָלֵקִ֗י פֶּן־אֹֽסִפְךָ֙ עִמּ֔וֹ וְאַתָּ֞ה עָשִׂ֤יתָֽה חֶ֙סֶד֙ עִם־כׇּל־בְּנֵ֣י יִשְׂרָאֵ֔ל בַּעֲלוֹתָ֖ם מִמִּצְרָ֑יִם וַיָּ֥סַר קֵינִ֖י מִתּ֥וֹךְ עֲמָלֵֽק׃
verses.douay_rheims: And Saul said to the Cinite: Go, depart, and get ye down from Amalec: lest I destroy thee with him. For thou hast shewn kindness to all the children of Israel, when they came up out of Egypt. And the Cinite departed from the midst of Amalec.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja antoi sanoa Keniläisille: menkäät, paetkaat ja eroittakaat itsenne Amalekilaisista, etten minä peräti hävittäisi teitä heidän kanssansa; sillä te teitte laupeuden kaikille Israelin lapsille, kuin he vaelsivat Egyptistä; ja niin luopuivat keniläiset Amalekilaisista.
verses.king_james: And Saul said unto the Kenites, Go, depart, get you down from among the Amalekites, lest I destroy you with them: for ye shewed kindness to all the children of Israel, when they came up out of Egypt. So the Kenites departed from among the Amalekites.

verses.latin_vulgate: Percussitque Saul Amalec ab Hevila donec venias ad Sur, quæ est e regione Ægypti.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיַּ֥ךְ שָׁא֖וּל אֶת־עֲמָלֵ֑ק מֵֽחֲוִילָה֙ בּוֹאֲךָ֣ שׁ֔וּר אֲשֶׁ֖ר עַל־פְּנֵ֥י מִצְרָֽיִם׃
verses.douay_rheims: And Saul smote Amalec from Hevila, until thou comest to Sur, which is over against Egypt.
verses.finnish_biblia: Niin löi Saul Amalekilaiset hamasta Hevilasta siihen asti kuin Suriin tullaan, joka on Egyptin kohdalla,
verses.king_james: And Saul smote the Amalekites from Havilah until thou comest to Shur, that is over against Egypt.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et apprehendit Agag regem Amalec vivum : omne autem vulgus interfecit in ore gladii.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּתְפֹּ֛שׂ אֶת־אֲגַ֥ג מֶלֶךְ־עֲמָלֵ֖ק חָ֑י וְאֶת־כׇּל־הָעָ֖ם הֶחֱרִ֥ים לְפִי־חָֽרֶב׃
verses.douay_rheims: And he took Agag, the king of Amalec, alive: but all the common people he slew with the edge of the sword.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja otti Agagin Amalekilaisten kuninkaan elävänä kiinni, ja kaiken kansan surmasi hän miekan terällä.
verses.king_james: And he took Agag the king of the Amalekites alive, and utterly destroyed all the people with the edge of the sword.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et pepercit Saul et populus Agag, et optimis gregibus ovium et armentorum, et vestibus et arietibus, et universis quæ pulchra erant, nec voluerunt disperdere ea : quidquid vero vile fuit et reprobum, hoc demoliti sunt.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיַּחְמֹל֩ שָׁא֨וּל וְהָעָ֜ם עַל־אֲגָ֗ג וְעַל־מֵיטַ֣ב הַצֹּאן֩ וְהַבָּקָ֨ר וְהַמִּשְׁנִ֤ים וְעַל־הַכָּרִים֙ וְעַל־כׇּל־הַטּ֔וֹב וְלֹ֥א אָב֖וּ הַחֲרִימָ֑ם וְכׇל־הַמְּלָאכָ֛ה נְמִבְזָ֥ה וְנָמֵ֖ס אֹתָ֥הּ הֶחֱרִֽימוּ׃ {פ}
verses.douay_rheims: And Saul and the people spared Agag, and the best of the flocks of sheep, and of the herds, and the garments and the rams, and all that was beautiful, and would not destroy them: but every thing that was vile, and good for nothing, that they destroyed.
verses.finnish_biblia: Niin Saul ja kansa säästi Agagin, ja mitä parasta lampaista ja karjasta oli, lihavia karitsoita ja syöttiläitä, ja kaikki mitä hyvä oli, ei he tahtoneet hukuttaa niitä; mutta sen, mikä häijy oli ja ei kelvannut, he hukuttivat.
verses.king_james: But Saul and the people spared Agag, and the best of the sheep, and of the oxen, and of the fatlings, and the lambs, and all that was good, and would not utterly destroy them: but every thing that was vile and refuse, that they destroyed utterly.

verses.latin_vulgate: Factum est autem verbum Domini ad Samuel, dicens :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַֽיְהִי֙ דְּבַר־יְהֹוָ֔ה אֶל־שְׁמוּאֵ֖ל לֵאמֹֽר׃
verses.douay_rheims: And the word of the Lord came to Samuel,
verses.finnish_biblia: Niin tapahtui Herran sana Samuelille, sanoen:
verses.king_james: Then came the word of the Lord unto Samuel, saying,

verses.latin_vulgate: Pœnitet me quod constituerim Saul regem : quia dereliquit me, et verba mea opere non implevit. Contristatusque est Samuel, et clamavit ad Dominum tota nocte.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: נִחַ֗מְתִּי כִּֽי־הִמְלַ֤כְתִּי אֶת־שָׁאוּל֙ לְמֶ֔לֶךְ כִּי־שָׁב֙ מֵֽאַחֲרַ֔י וְאֶת־דְּבָרַ֖י לֹ֣א הֵקִ֑ים וַיִּ֙חַר֙ לִשְׁמוּאֵ֔ל וַיִּזְעַ֥ק אֶל־יְהֹוָ֖ה כׇּל־הַלָּֽיְלָה׃
verses.douay_rheims: It repenteth me that I have made Saul king: for he hath forsaken me, and hath not executed my commandments. And Samuel was grieved, and he cried unto the Lord all night.
verses.finnish_biblia: Minä kadun, että minä olen tehnyt Saulin kuninkaaksi, sillä hän on luopunut minusta ja ei täyttänyt minun sanojani; ja Samuel vihastui ja huusi Herran tykö kaiken sen yön.
verses.king_james: It repenteth me that I have set up Saul to be king: for he is turned back from following me, and hath not performed my commandments. And it grieved Samuel; and he cried unto the Lord all night.

verses.latin_vulgate: Cumque de nocte surrexisset Samuel ut iret ad Saul mane, nuntiatum est Samueli eo quod venisset Saul in Carmelum, et erexisset sibi fornicem triumphalem, et reversus transisset, descendissetque in Galgala. Venit ergo Samuel ad Saul, et Saul offerebat holocaustum Domino de initiis prædarum quæ attulerat ex Amalec.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיַּשְׁכֵּ֧ם שְׁמוּאֵ֛ל לִקְרַ֥את שָׁא֖וּל בַּבֹּ֑קֶר וַיֻּגַּ֨ד לִשְׁמוּאֵ֜ל לֵאמֹ֗ר בָּֽא־שָׁא֤וּל הַכַּרְמֶ֙לָה֙ וְהִנֵּ֨ה מַצִּ֥יב לוֹ֙ יָ֔ד וַיִּסֹּב֙ וַֽיַּעֲבֹ֔ר וַיֵּ֖רֶד הַגִּלְגָּֽל׃
verses.douay_rheims: And when Samuel rose early, to go to Saul in the morning, it was told Samuel that Saul was come to Carmel, and had erected for himself a triumphant arch, and returning had passed on, and gone down to Galgal. And Samuel came to Saul, and Saul was offering a holocaust to the Lord, out of the choicest of the spoils, which he had brought from Amalec.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Samuel nousi varhain huomeneltain kohtaamaan Saulia, ja Samuelille oli sanottu Saulin tulleeksi Karmeliin, ja panneeksi voiton merkin, ja vaeltaneeksi ympäri, ja tulleeksi Gilgaliin.
verses.king_james: And when Samuel rose early to meet Saul in the morning, it was told Samuel, saying, Saul came to Carmel, and, behold, he set him up a place, and is gone about, and passed on, and gone down to Gilgal.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et cum venisset Samuel ad Saul, dixit ei Saul : Benedictus tu Domino : implevi verbum Domini.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיָּבֹ֥א שְׁמוּאֵ֖ל אֶל־שָׁא֑וּל וַיֹּ֧אמֶר ל֣וֹ שָׁא֗וּל בָּר֤וּךְ אַתָּה֙ לַֽיהֹוָ֔ה הֲקִימֹ֖תִי אֶת־דְּבַ֥ר יְהֹוָֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: And when Samuel was come to Saul, Saul said to him: Blessed be thou of the Lord, I have fulfilled the word of the Lord.
verses.finnish_biblia: Kuin Samuel tuli Saulin tykö, sanoi Saul hänelle: siunattu ole sinä Herralta; minä olen täyttänyt Herran sanan.
verses.king_james: And Samuel came to Saul: and Saul said unto him, Blessed be thou of the Lord: I have performed the commandment of the Lord.

verses.latin_vulgate: Dixitque Samuel : Et quæ est hæc vox gregum, quæ resonat in auribus meis, et armentorum, quam ego audio ?
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיֹּ֣אמֶר שְׁמוּאֵ֔ל וּמֶ֛ה קֽוֹל־הַצֹּ֥אן הַזֶּ֖ה בְּאׇזְנָ֑י וְק֣וֹל הַבָּקָ֔ר אֲשֶׁ֥ר אָנֹכִ֖י שֹׁמֵֽעַ׃
verses.douay_rheims: And Samuel said: What meaneth then this bleating of the flocks, which soundeth in my ears, and the lowing of the herds, which I hear?
verses.finnish_biblia: Samuel vastasi: mikä siis on tämä lammasten määkynä minun korvissani ja karjan ammuminen, jonka minä kuulen?
verses.king_james: And Samuel said, What meaneth then this bleating of the sheep in mine ears, and the lowing of the oxen which I hear?

verses.latin_vulgate: Et ait Saul : De Amalec adduxerunt ea : pepercit enim populus melioribus ovibus et armentis ut immolarentur Domino Deo tuo, reliqua vero occidimus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיֹּ֨אמֶר שָׁא֜וּל מֵעֲמָלֵקִ֣י הֱבִיא֗וּם אֲשֶׁ֨ר חָמַ֤ל הָעָם֙ עַל־מֵיטַ֤ב הַצֹּאן֙ וְהַבָּקָ֔ר לְמַ֥עַן זְבֹ֖חַ לַיהֹוָ֣ה אֱלֹהֶ֑יךָ וְאֶת־הַיּוֹתֵ֖ר הֶחֱרַֽמְנוּ׃ {פ}
verses.douay_rheims: And Saul said: They have brought them from Amalec: for the people spared the best of the sheep and of the herds, that they might be sacrificed to the Lord thy God, but the rest we have slain.
verses.finnish_biblia: Saul sanoi: Amalekilaisilta ovat he ne tuoneet; sillä kansa säästi parhaita lampaista ja karjasta, Herran sinun Jumalas uhrin tähden; ne muut olemme me hävittäneet.
verses.king_james: And Saul said, They have brought them from the Amalekites: for the people spared the best of the sheep and of the oxen, to sacrifice unto the Lord thy God; and the rest we have utterly destroyed.

verses.latin_vulgate: Ait autem Samuel ad Saul : Sine me, et indicabo tibi quæ locutus sit Dominus ad me nocte. Dixitque ei : Loquere.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיֹּ֤אמֶר שְׁמוּאֵל֙ אֶל־שָׁא֔וּל הֶ֚רֶף וְאַגִּ֣ידָה לְּךָ֔ אֵת֩ אֲשֶׁ֨ר דִּבֶּ֧ר יְהֹוָ֛ה אֵלַ֖י הַלָּ֑יְלָה (ויאמרו) [וַיֹּ֥אמֶר] ל֖וֹ דַּבֵּֽר׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: And Samuel said to Saul: Suffer me, and I will tell thee what the Lord hath said to me this night. And he said to him: Speak.
verses.finnish_biblia: Mutta Samuel sanoi Saulille: salli, että minä sanon sinulle, mitä Herra on puhunut minun kanssani tänä yönä. Hän sanoi hänelle: puhu!
verses.king_james: Then Samuel said unto Saul, Stay, and I will tell thee what the Lord hath said to me this night. And he said unto him, Say on.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et ait Samuel : Nonne cum parvulus esses in oculis tuis, caput in tribubus Israël factus es ? unxitque te Dominus in regem super Israël,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיֹּ֣אמֶר שְׁמוּאֵ֔ל הֲל֗וֹא אִם־קָטֹ֤ן אַתָּה֙ בְּעֵינֶ֔יךָ רֹ֛אשׁ שִׁבְטֵ֥י יִשְׂרָאֵ֖ל אָ֑תָּה וַיִּמְשָׁחֲךָ֧ יְהֹוָ֛ה לְמֶ֖לֶךְ עַל־יִשְׂרָאֵֽל׃
verses.douay_rheims: And Samuel said: When thou wast a little one in thy own eyes, wast thou not made the head of the tribes of Israel? And the Lord anointed thee to be king over Israel.
verses.finnish_biblia: Samuel sanoi: eikö se näin ole? Kuin sinä olit vähäinen sinun silmäis edessä, tulit sinä Israelin sukukuntain pääksi, ja Herra voiteli sinun Israelin kuninkaaksi.
verses.king_james: And Samuel said, When thou wast little in thine own sight, wast thou not made the head of the tribes of Israel, and the Lord anointed thee king over Israel?

verses.latin_vulgate: et misit te Dominus in viam, et ait : Vade, et interfice peccatores Amalec, et pugnabis contra eos usque ad internecionem eorum ?
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּשְׁלָחֲךָ֥ יְהֹוָ֖ה בְּדָ֑רֶךְ וַיֹּ֗אמֶר לֵ֣ךְ וְהַחֲרַמְתָּ֞ה אֶת־הַֽחַטָּאִים֙ אֶת־עֲמָלֵ֔ק וְנִלְחַמְתָּ֣ ב֔וֹ עַ֥ד כַּלּוֹתָ֖ם אֹתָֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: And the Lord sent thee on the way, and said: Go, and kill the sinners of Amalec, and thou shalt fight against them until thou hast utterly destroyed them.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Herra lähetti sinun matkaan ja sanoi: mene ja tapa ne syntiset Amalekilaiset ja sodi heitä vastaan, niinkauvan että hukutat heidät.
verses.king_james: And the Lord sent thee on a journey, and said, Go and utterly destroy the sinners the Amalekites, and fight against them until they be consumed.

verses.latin_vulgate: Quare ergo non audisti vocem Domini : sed versus ad prædam es, et fecisti malum in oculis Domini ?
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְלָ֥מָּה לֹֽא־שָׁמַ֖עְתָּ בְּק֣וֹל יְהֹוָ֑ה וַתַּ֙עַט֙ אֶל־הַשָּׁלָ֔ל וַתַּ֥עַשׂ הָרַ֖ע בְּעֵינֵ֥י יְהֹוָֽה׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: Why then didst thou not hearken to the voice of the Lord: but hast turned to the prey, and hast done evil in the eyes of the Lord?
verses.finnish_biblia: Miksi et kuullut Herran ääntä? mutta annoit itses saaliin puoleen ja teit pahoin Herran silmäin edessä?
verses.king_james: Wherefore then didst thou not obey the voice of the Lord, but didst fly upon the spoil, and didst evil in the sight of the Lord?

verses.latin_vulgate: Et ait Saul ad Samuelem : Immo audivi vocem Domini, et ambulavi in via per quam misit me Dominus, et adduxi Agag regem Amalec, et Amalec interfeci.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיֹּ֨אמֶר שָׁא֜וּל אֶל־שְׁמוּאֵ֗ל אֲשֶׁ֤ר שָׁמַ֙עְתִּי֙ בְּק֣וֹל יְהֹוָ֔ה וָאֵלֵ֕ךְ בַּדֶּ֖רֶךְ אֲשֶׁר־שְׁלָחַ֣נִי יְהֹוָ֑ה וָאָבִ֗יא אֶת־אֲגַג֙ מֶ֣לֶךְ עֲמָלֵ֔ק וְאֶת־עֲמָלֵ֖ק הֶחֱרַֽמְתִּי׃
verses.douay_rheims: And Saul said to Samuel: Yea, I have hearkened to the voice of the Lord, and have walked in the way by which the Lord sent me, and have brought Agag, the king of Amalec, and Amalec I have slain.
verses.finnish_biblia: Niin sanoi Saul Samuelille: minä olen kuitenkin kuullut Herran äänen ja olen vaeltanut sitä tietä, kuin Herra minun lähetti: minä olen tuonut tänne Agagin Amalekilaisten kuninkaan ja surmannut Amalekilaiset.
verses.king_james: And Saul said unto Samuel, Yea, I have obeyed the voice of the Lord, and have gone the way which the Lord sent me, and have brought Agag the king of Amalek, and have utterly destroyed the Amalekites.

verses.latin_vulgate: Tulit autem de præda populus oves et boves, primitias eorum quæ cæsa sunt, ut immolet Domino Deo suo in Galgalis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּקַּ֨ח הָעָ֧ם מֵהַשָּׁלָ֛ל צֹ֥אן וּבָקָ֖ר רֵאשִׁ֣ית הַחֵ֑רֶם לִזְבֹּ֛חַ לַיהֹוָ֥ה אֱלֹהֶ֖יךָ בַּגִּלְגָּֽל׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: But the people took of the spoils, sheep and oxen, as the firstfruits of those things that were slain, to offer sacrifice to the Lord their God in Galgal.
verses.finnish_biblia: Mutta väki on ottanut saaliista, lampaita ja karjaa: ne parhaat kirotuista, uhrataksensa Gilgalissa Herralle sinun Jumalalles.
verses.king_james: But the people took of the spoil, sheep and oxen, the chief of the things which should have been utterly destroyed, to sacrifice unto the Lord thy God in Gilgal.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et ait Samuel : Numquid vult Dominus holocausta et victimas, et non potius ut obediatur voci Domini ? melior est enim obedientia quam victimæ, et auscultare magis quam offerre adipem arietum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיֹּ֣אמֶר שְׁמוּאֵ֗ל הַחֵ֤פֶץ לַֽיהֹוָה֙ בְּעֹל֣וֹת וּזְבָחִ֔ים כִּשְׁמֹ֖עַ בְּק֣וֹל יְהֹוָ֑ה הִנֵּ֤ה שְׁמֹ֙עַ֙ מִזֶּ֣בַח ט֔וֹב לְהַקְשִׁ֖יב מֵחֵ֥לֶב אֵילִֽים׃
verses.douay_rheims: And Samuel said: Doth the Lord desire holocausts and victims, and not rather that the voice of the Lord should be obeyed? For obedience is better than sacrifices: and to hearken rather than to offer the fat or rams.
verses.finnish_biblia: Mutta Samuel sanoi: kelpaako Herralle paremmin polttouhri ja uhri, kuin että sinä kuulisit Herran äänen? Katso, kuuliaisuus on parempi kuin uhri, ja totella parempi kuin oinasten lihavuus.
verses.king_james: And Samuel said, Hath the Lord as great delight in burnt offerings and sacrifices, as in obeying the voice of the Lord? Behold, to obey is better than sacrifice, and to hearken than the fat of rams.

verses.latin_vulgate: Quoniam quasi peccatum ariolandi est, repugnare : et quasi scelus idololatriæ, nolle acquiescere. Pro eo ergo quod abjecisti sermonem Domini, abjecit te Dominus ne sis rex.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כִּ֤י חַטַּאת־קֶ֙סֶם֙ מֶ֔רִי וְאָ֥וֶן וּתְרָפִ֖ים הַפְצַ֑ר יַ֗עַן מָאַ֙סְתָּ֙ אֶת־דְּבַ֣ר יְהֹוָ֔ה וַיִּמְאָסְךָ֖ מִמֶּֽלֶךְ׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: Because it is like the sin of witchcraft, to rebel: and like the crime of idolatry, to refuse to obey. Forasmuch, therefore, as thou hast rejected the word of the Lord, the Lord hath also rejected thee from being king.
verses.finnish_biblia: Sillä tottelemattomuus on noituuden synti, ja vastahakoisuus on taikaus ja epäjumalan palvelus: ettäs siis olet hyljännyt Herran sanan, on hän sinun myös hyljännyt, ettei sinun silleen pidä kuningasna oleman.
verses.king_james: For rebellion is as the sin of witchcraft, and stubbornness is as iniquity and idolatry. Because thou hast rejected the word of the Lord, he hath also rejected thee from being king.

verses.latin_vulgate: Dixitque Saul ad Samuelem : Peccavi, quia prævaricatus sum sermonem Domini et verba tua, timens populum, et obediens voci eorum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיֹּ֨אמֶר שָׁא֤וּל אֶל־שְׁמוּאֵל֙ חָטָ֔אתִי כִּֽי־עָבַ֥רְתִּי אֶת־פִּֽי־יְהֹוָ֖ה וְאֶת־דְּבָרֶ֑יךָ כִּ֤י יָרֵ֙אתִי֙ אֶת־הָעָ֔ם וָאֶשְׁמַ֖ע בְּקוֹלָֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: And Saul said to Samuel: I have sinned, because I have transgressed the commandment of the Lord, and thy words, fearing the people, and obeying their voice.
verses.finnish_biblia: Niin sanoi Saul Samuelille: minä olen syntiä tehnyt rikkoissani Herran käskyn ja sinun sanas; sillä minä pelkäsin kansaa ja kuulin heidän äänensä.
verses.king_james: And Saul said unto Samuel, I have sinned: for I have transgressed the commandment of the Lord, and thy words: because I feared the people, and obeyed their voice.

verses.latin_vulgate: Sed nunc porta, quæso, peccatum meum, et revertere mecum, ut adorem Dominum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְעַתָּ֕ה שָׂ֥א נָ֖א אֶת־חַטָּאתִ֑י וְשׁ֣וּב עִמִּ֔י וְאֶֽשְׁתַּחֲוֶ֖ה לַיהֹוָֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: But now bear, I beseech thee, my sin, and return with me, that I may adore the Lord.
verses.finnish_biblia: Anna siis nyt minulle tämä synti anteeksi, ja palaja minun kanssani, että minä kumartaisin ja rukoilisin Herraa.
verses.king_james: Now therefore, I pray thee, pardon my sin, and turn again with me, that I may worship the Lord.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et ait Samuel ad Saul : Non revertar tecum, quia projecisti sermonem Domini, et projecit te Dominus ne sis rex super Israël.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיֹּ֤אמֶר שְׁמוּאֵל֙ אֶל־שָׁא֔וּל לֹ֥א אָשׁ֖וּב עִמָּ֑ךְ כִּ֤י מָאַ֙סְתָּה֙ אֶת־דְּבַ֣ר יְהֹוָ֔ה וַיִּמְאָסְךָ֣ יְהֹוָ֔ה מִֽהְי֥וֹת מֶ֖לֶךְ עַל־יִשְׂרָאֵֽל׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: And Samuel said to Saul: I will not return with thee, because thou hath rejected the word of the Lord, and the Lord hath rejected thee from being king over Israel.
verses.finnish_biblia: Samuel sanoi Saulille: en minä palaja sinun kanssas; sillä sinä olet hyljännyt Herran sanan, ja Herra on myös sinun hyljännyt, niin ettei sinun pidä oleman Israelin kuninkaana.
verses.king_james: And Samuel said unto Saul, I will not return with thee: for thou hast rejected the word of the Lord, and the Lord hath rejected thee from being king over Israel.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et conversus est Samuel ut abiret : ille autem apprehendit summitatem pallii ejus, quæ et scissa est.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּסֹּ֥ב שְׁמוּאֵ֖ל לָלֶ֑כֶת וַיַּחֲזֵ֥ק בִּכְנַף־מְעִיל֖וֹ וַיִּקָּרַֽע׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: And Samuel turned about to go away: but he laid hold upon the skirt of his mantle, and it rent.
verses.finnish_biblia: Kuin Samuel käänsi itsensä menemään pois, otti hän hänen hameensa liepeestä kiinni, ja se repesi.
verses.king_james: And as Samuel turned about to go away, he laid hold upon the skirt of his mantle, and it rent.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et ait ad eum Samuel : Scidit Dominus regnum Israël a te hodie, et tradidit illud proximo tuo meliori te.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיֹּ֤אמֶר אֵלָיו֙ שְׁמוּאֵ֔ל קָרַ֨ע יְהֹוָ֜ה אֶֽת־מַמְלְכ֧וּת יִשְׂרָאֵ֛ל מֵעָלֶ֖יךָ הַיּ֑וֹם וּנְתָנָ֕הּ לְרֵעֲךָ֖ הַטּ֥וֹב מִמֶּֽךָּ׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: And Samuel said to him: The Lord hath rent the kingdom of Israel from thee this day, and hath given it to thy neighbour who is better than thee.
verses.finnish_biblia: Niin sanoi Samuel hänelle: Herra on tänäpänä repinyt Israelin valtakunnan sinulta ja antanut sen lähimmäiselles, joka parempi on sinua.
verses.king_james: And Samuel said unto him, The Lord hath rent the kingdom of Israel from thee this day, and hath given it to a neighbour of thine, that is better than thou.

verses.latin_vulgate: Porro triumphator in Israël non parcet, et pœnitudine non flectetur : neque enim homo est ut agat pœnitentiam.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְגַם֙ נֵ֣צַח יִשְׂרָאֵ֔ל לֹ֥א יְשַׁקֵּ֖ר וְלֹ֣א יִנָּחֵ֑ם כִּ֣י לֹ֥א אָדָ֛ם ה֖וּא לְהִנָּחֵֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: But the triumpher in Israel will not spare, and will not be moved to repentance: for he is not a man that he should repent.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Israelin sankari ei valehtele eikä kadu; sillä ei hän ole ihminen, että hän katuis.
verses.king_james: And also the Strength of Israel will not lie nor repent: for he is not a man, that he should repent.

verses.latin_vulgate: At ille ait : Peccavi : sed nunc honora me coram senioribus populi mei et coram Israël, et revertere mecum, ut adorem Dominum Deum tuum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיֹּ֣אמֶר חָטָ֔אתִי עַתָּ֗ה כַּבְּדֵ֥נִי נָ֛א נֶ֥גֶד זִקְנֵֽי־עַמִּ֖י וְנֶ֣גֶד יִשְׂרָאֵ֑ל וְשׁ֣וּב עִמִּ֔י וְהִֽשְׁתַּחֲוֵ֖יתִי לַיהֹוָ֥ה אֱלֹהֶֽיךָ׃
verses.douay_rheims: Then he said: I have sinned: yet honour me now before the ancients of my people, and before Israel, and return with me, that I may adore the Lord thy God.
verses.finnish_biblia: Mutta hän sanoi: minä olen syntiä tehnyt. Tee siis minulle nyt kunnia minun kansani vanhimpain edessä ja Israelin edessä ja palaja minun kanssani, että minä kumartaen rukoilisin Herraa sinun Jumalaas.
verses.king_james: Then he said, I have sinned: yet honour me now, I pray thee, before the elders of my people, and before Israel, and turn again with me, that I may worship the Lord thy God.

verses.latin_vulgate: Reversus ergo Samuel secutus est Saulem : et adoravit Saul Dominum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיָּ֥שׇׁב שְׁמוּאֵ֖ל אַחֲרֵ֣י שָׁא֑וּל וַיִּשְׁתַּ֥חוּ שָׁא֖וּל לַיהֹוָֽה׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: So Samuel turned again after Saul: and Saul adored the Lord.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Samuel käänsi itsensä ja seurasi Saulia; ja Saul rukoili Herraa.
verses.king_james: So Samuel turned again after Saul; and Saul worshipped the Lord.

verses.latin_vulgate: Dixitque Samuel : Adducite ad me Agag regem Amalec. Et oblatus est ei Agag, pinguissimus et tremens. Et dixit Agag : Siccine separat amara mors ?
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיֹּ֣אמֶר שְׁמוּאֵ֗ל הַגִּ֤ישׁוּ אֵלַי֙ אֶת־אֲגַג֙ מֶ֣לֶךְ עֲמָלֵ֔ק וַיֵּ֣לֶךְ אֵלָ֔יו אֲגַ֖ג מַעֲדַנֹּ֑ת וַיֹּ֣אמֶר אֲגָ֔ג אָכֵ֖ן סָ֥ר מַר־הַמָּֽוֶת׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: And Samuel said: Bring hither to me Agag, the king of Amalec. And Agag was presented to him very fat, and trembling. And Agag said: Doth bitter death separate in this manner?
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Samuel sanoi: antakaat Agagin tulla minun tyköni, Amalekilaisten kuninkaan. Ja Agag tuli rohkiasti hänen eteensä ja sanoi: totisesti kuoleman katkeruus on paennut.
verses.king_james: Then said Samuel, Bring ye hither to me Agag the king of the Amalekites. And Agag came unto him delicately. And Agag said, Surely the bitterness of death is past.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et ait Samuel : Sicut fecit absque liberis mulieres gladius tuus, sic absque liberis erit inter mulieres mater tua. Et in frustra concidit eum Samuel coram Domino in Galgalis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיֹּ֣אמֶר שְׁמוּאֵ֔ל כַּאֲשֶׁ֨ר שִׁכְּלָ֤ה נָשִׁים֙ חַרְבֶּ֔ךָ כֵּן־תִּשְׁכַּ֥ל מִנָּשִׁ֖ים אִמֶּ֑ךָ וַיְשַׁסֵּ֨ף שְׁמוּאֵ֧ל אֶת־אֲגָ֛ג לִפְנֵ֥י יְהֹוָ֖ה בַּגִּלְגָּֽל׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: And Samuel said: As thy sword hath made women childless, so shall thy mother be childless among women. And Samuel hewed him in pieces before the Lord in Galgal.
verses.finnish_biblia: Samuel sanoi: niinkuin sinun miekkas on tehnyt vaimot lapsettomaksi, niin pitää myös sinun äitis vaimoin seassa lapsetoin oleman; niin Samuel hakkasi Agagin kappeleiksi Herran edessä Gilgalissa.
verses.king_james: And Samuel said, As thy sword hath made women childless, so shall thy mother be childless among women. And Samuel hewed Agag in pieces before the Lord in Gilgal.

verses.latin_vulgate: Abiit autem Samuel in Ramatha : Saul vero ascendit in domum suam in Gabaa.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיֵּ֥לֶךְ שְׁמוּאֵ֖ל הָרָמָ֑תָה וְשָׁא֛וּל עָלָ֥ה אֶל־בֵּית֖וֹ גִּבְעַ֥ת שָׁאֽוּל׃
verses.douay_rheims: And Samuel departed to Ramatha: but Saul went up to his house in Gabaa.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Samuel meni Ramaan, mutta Saul meni huoneeseensa Saulin Gibeaan.
verses.king_james: Then Samuel went to Ramah; and Saul went up to his house to Gibeah of Saul.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et non vidit Samuel ultra Saul usque ad diem mortis suæ : verumtamen lugebat Samuel Saulem, quoniam Dominum pœnitebat quod constituisset eum regem super Israël.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְלֹא־יָסַ֨ף שְׁמוּאֵ֜ל לִרְא֤וֹת אֶת־שָׁאוּל֙ עַד־י֣וֹם מוֹת֔וֹ כִּֽי־הִתְאַבֵּ֥ל שְׁמוּאֵ֖ל אֶל־שָׁא֑וּל וַיהֹוָ֣ה נִחָ֔ם כִּֽי־הִמְלִ֥יךְ אֶת־שָׁא֖וּל עַל־יִשְׂרָאֵֽל׃ {פ}
verses.douay_rheims: And Samuel saw Saul no more till the day of his death: nevertheless, Samuel mourned for Saul, because the Lord repented that he had made him king over Israel.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja ei nähnyt Samuel enää Saulia kuolemapäivään asti; sillä Samuel murehti Saulia, että Herra oli katunut asettaneensa hänen Israelin kuninkaaksi.
verses.king_james: And Samuel came no more to see Saul until the day of his death: nevertheless Samuel mourned for Saul: and the Lord repented that he had made Saul king over Israel.
